title: Log real GDP per capita: East Asian developmentalist cases vs synthetic counterfactuals
subtitle: Per-case synthetic control (KOR 1961, TWN 1960, SGP 1965, CHN 1978). Average ATT at 40-yr horizon: +1.088 log-points (~+197%).

annotations.label: Donor pool: ARG, BRA, MEX, CHL, IND, PAK, LKA, PHL, THA, GHA, EGY, TUR, IDN. Synth-DiD downgraded to per-case SC averaged.
